Name: The Will to Power
Space Effect: Gain Control of the staff at the end of the round. A Mage here loses all Mage Powers.
Action: Gain your choice of 3 Mana, 2 Research, 1 INT, or 1 WIS.

Name: The Force of Magic
Space Effect: Gain Control of the staff at the end of the round. A Mage here loses all Mage Powers.
Action: Cast a Spell from your office, even one you have not researched, without paying any Mana.
